steps.title: Identify the core requirement: compare disadvantages
steps.content: The task requires comparing the disadvantages of both systems. From the notes, each has a distinct problem: Wairakei's flash steam system requires extremely hot reservoirs (a limiting constraint), while Traunreut's binary cycle system costs more to maintain. An effective comparison must show these disadvantages in relation to each other, revealing the trade-off between the two approaches.

steps.title: Find the choice that shows the trade-off
steps.content: C shows the direct relationship between both disadvantages: Traunreut overcomes Wairakei's temperature limitation but introduces higher maintenance costs. The other choices do not address both disadvantages in this comparative way. That matches choice C — C is correct.
